---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
---

<div class="page-wrapper">

<p>
If you’d like to talk about projects, ideas, or potential opportunities, the easiest way to reach me is through GitHub or LinkedIn. I’m open to conversations about data science, automation, and practical AI applications, as well as feedback on the things I’m building.
</p>

<h2 class="section-title">Contact details</h2>

<ul class="contact-list">
<li><strong>GitHub:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/KNHNF">github.com/KNHNF</a></li>
<li><strong>LinkedIn:</strong> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/karan-homayounfar/">linkedin.com/in/karan-homayounfar</a></li>
</ul>

<p>
If you prefer email, you can reach me at:
</p>

<p>
<strong>Email:</strong> <a href="karan.homayounfar@gmail.com">karan.homayounfar@gmail.com</a></li>
</p>

<div class="site-footer">
<div class="footer-links">
<a href="index.html">Home</a>
<a href="about.html">About</a>
<a href="projects.html">Projects</a>
<a href="contact.html">Contact</a>
</div>

<div class="footer-icons">
<a href="https://github.com/KNHNF" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/karan-homayounfar/" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
</div>

<div class="footer-copy">
© Karan Homayounfar — Built with Quarto.
</div>
</div>
</div>
